stemHtml: Considering clearways, which of the following answers is correct?

options.a: A clearway must be capable of supporting the weight of an aeroplane without causing structural damage.
options.b: A clearway is an area of land or water beyond the runway that must be under the control of the airport authority.
options.c: Clearway can be expressed as a surface extending from the end of the runway, with an upward slope of 1.5% through which no obstacle or terrain must protrude.
options.d: The minimum clearway width is 90 m either side of the extended centreline.
